title: Lead Solution Architect
description:
A leading global bank with a strong regional presence is seeking a dynamic Lead Solution Architect to join their high-performing technology team. This is a unique opportunity to drive enterprise-scale architecture initiatives across critical banking platforms in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the conceptualization and design of technical solution architectures aligned with project requirements and enterprise IT strategies.
  • Collaborate with enterprise architects, system SMEs, and product vendors to ensure proposed solutions comply with organizational standards, guidelines, and strategic objectives.
  • Serve as the key liaison between enterprise architecture teams and technical delivery units, translating strategic vision into actionable implementation plans.
  • Provide technical leadership in evaluating emerging technologies, frameworks, and platform capabilities to enhance solution design and delivery.
  • Guide and mentor development teams and technical leads in applying architecture principles, design patterns, and best practices.
  • Develop, review, and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for solution architectures.
  • Facilitate architecture review processes, ensuring effective communication and alignment across cross-functional stakeholders.
  • Present and secure approval for proposed solutions from IT leadership and enterprise architecture governance boards.
  • Lead and manage a team of solution architects, fostering professional growth and driving value-added services across projects.
  • Ensure architectural deliverables meet quality standards and address both functional and non-functional requirements, including performance, scalability, reliability, and security.
  • Stay abreast of evolving technology trends, platforms, and industry innovations to inform future architecture strategies.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Systems, or a related discipline.
  • Minimum 15 years of experience in the financial services industry, with at least 10 years in solution architecture and design roles.
  • Strong understanding of system development and project implementation lifecycles within banking environments.
  • Proven experience in leading and developing high-performing architecture teams.
  • Demonstrated success in designing and implementing enterprise-scale solutions involving full-stack integration across channels, systems, middleware, and data platforms.
  • Experience integrating commercial off-the-shelf products and cloud-native solutions is highly desirable.
  • Hands-on expertise in application modernization and data/application migration strategies and tools.
  • Familiarity with banking technologies, core systems, and industry trends.
  • Technical proficiency in the following areas is preferred:
    Modern engineering practices: DevOps, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), microservices, enterprise integration patterns
    Data platforms and architecture: Oracle, MS-SQL, data warehouse, data lake
    Cloud services: Microsoft Azure (APIM, Function Apps, Logic Apps, Azure SQL DB)
    Middleware technologies: IBM MQ, IWA, MFT

Interested candidates please email your latest resume to subagio@tangspac.com

postedCompany.description:
Tangspac Consulting is an award-winning professional staffing firm with a 20-year footprint in Asia and headquarters in Singapore dating back to 1993. It offers bespoke contingency search and professional services across various Finance & Technology sectors. 

Our team of consultants has unparalleled expertise and track-record in serving both buy-side and sell-side firms, including the largest names on Wall Street. We have successfully placed thousands of banking professionals across various business & technology verticals. Clients range from Corporate & Investment Banks, Asset Managers, Custodians, Trusts, Private Banks, to other Publicly Traded Companies.
 

Tangspac is a founding member of The Association of Professional Staffing Companies (APSCo) Asia, which is a trade body originally established in the UK that maintains close relationships with key government departments and agencies on behalf of the professional staffing industry.
postedCompany.name: TANGSPAC CONSULTING PTE LTD

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
